name: Forced Convection — High Power
description: 50W forced convection case at 3 m/s approach velocity. Should demonstrate significant improvement over natural convection.

provenance.citation: Internal regression baseline captured from the local heatsink designer model snapshot on 2026-04-24.
provenance.notes: Baseline refreshed 2026-04-24 after the ε-NTU LMTD correction was added to the forced-convection branch (NTU≈0.35, ε≈0.30 here). Pre-fix snapshot had R_sink≈0.267 K/W; the fix raises it to ≈0.311 because the inlet-ΔT formulation was over-predicting heat removal at finite stream capacity. Laminar regime (Re~1739).

notes: Geometry values in mm. Tests forced-convection path with elevated ambient.
